generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted, MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring motor current (I_M)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler, SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxPositionAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position angle data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current (I_M) data from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from motor current and simulations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Acceleration data derived from angular velocity"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description"
    DTDFVocab:enables AssetDescriptionService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance SinumerikControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling of first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SystemModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "System modeling using SysML Block Definition Diagram and Internal Block Diagram"
    DTDFVocab:provides StructuralModelInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight, AdjustControlAlgorithmAction
]

instance AssetDescriptionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Asset description using Asset Administration Shells (AAS)"
    DTDFVocab:provides AssetDescriptionInsight
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT-based data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataStreamingInsight
]

instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Robot control via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:provides RobotControlInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated dashboard visualization for real-time data monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringDataInsight
]

instance TwinningProcessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven twinning process with four steps: problem identification (friction loss detection), asset and model analysis (SysML structural modeling), use of Simulink friction models, and data trace identification; dynamic exchange of friction models via pipeline for continuous improvement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousImprovementInsight
]

instance StructuralModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural model of the first axis components"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data analysis used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance AssetDescriptionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Standardized asset description via AAS"
]

instance RealTimeDataStreamingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT protocol"
]

instance RobotControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Control algorithms for robot motion"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data for robot motion and friction parameters"
]

instance ContinuousImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous improvement of friction models through dynamic exchange via pipeline"
]

instance AdjustControlAlgorithmAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with positional accuracy 0.1 mm, path repeatability 0.06 mm, and operational range [-90°, 90°]"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and identification as per the abstract's reference to 'real-time, data-driven representations of robot joint behavior' for friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow composed of SysML engineering models, Simulink simulation models, MQTT-streamed sensor data traces, processing components for friction calculation, and unified dashboard for integrated visualization of simulated vs. measured data."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, utilizing live operational data during robot motion for friction model identification and validation against measured data."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via comparison of simulated data versus measured data; robot-specific parameters from manufacturer used in dynamics model for torque calculation to ensure model accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for transmitting sensor data (current, position, velocity, acceleration) from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset description and SysML for system modeling, adhering to Industry 4.0 standards."
]
